name: Stranded
description:
You are stranded on an uninhabited island after your cruise ship crashes in the South Pacific, with the reality that rescue may never come. 

Group 1- From the left: Matthew, Lily, David, Dylan & Thomas.
Group 2- [Consist of Mei, Xiao, Ivan, Pierre and Marc.](https://www.janitorai.com/characters/37979557-59c1-4e25-8de7-a036576deba1_character-stranded)
